title: Employer — fill & publish internship (EI-02 + EI-03)
oneLiner: Automated tester entry: open form, type every field, publish, then college approves for campus.

steps.label: Landing page ready
steps.observe: Home page is open. Next step signs in as employer (hr@techcorp.com) automatically — you should land on the employer dashboard.

steps.label: Log in as employer
steps.observe: Employer dashboard loads (sign-in is automatic — no manual login needed).

steps.label: Open campus tie-up directory
steps.observe: List of colleges with status badges (Approved / Pending / Request tie-up).

steps.label: Request tie-up with IIT Madras (if not already Approved)
steps.observe: Toast confirms request, or row already shows Approved — either is OK.

steps.label: Log in as college admin
steps.observe: College dashboard loads.

steps.label: Open Employer Partnership Requests
steps.observe: Pending list shows TechCorp Solutions (if request was sent).

steps.label: Approve TechCorp partnership request
steps.observe: TechCorp row disappears or status becomes approved.

steps.label: Log in as employer again
steps.observe: Employer hub loads.

steps.label: Navigate to Internship Programs
steps.observe: Page title Internship Programs; list or empty state visible.

steps.label: Scan internship list and status filter
steps.observe: Note existing postings (draft / published / closed).

steps.label: Click Post Internship to open the create form
steps.observe: Post New Internship card appears with campus checkboxes and fields.

steps.label: Review target campuses (pre-selected when form opens)
steps.observe: At least one approved campus checkbox is checked.

steps.label: Type internship title
steps.observe: Title field shows the guided test title with session marker.

steps.label: Set internship start date
steps.observe: Start date shows 01 Jul 2026.

steps.label: Set internship end date
steps.observe: End date shows 31 Dec 2026.

steps.label: Type stipend minimum (INR/month)
steps.observe: Stipend min field shows 25000.

steps.label: Type stipend maximum (INR/month)
steps.observe: Stipend max field shows 35000.

steps.label: Type number of openings
steps.observe: Openings field shows 3.

steps.label: Type minimum CGPA
steps.observe: Min CGPA field shows 7.5.

steps.label: Type eligible branches
steps.observe: Eligible branches shows All (every branch).

steps.label: Type batch year (2026 — matches seeded students)
steps.observe: Batch year field shows 2026.

steps.label: Type skills / keywords
steps.observe: Skills field shows Python, SQL, Data Analysis.

steps.label: Type additional notes
steps.observe: Notes textarea shows guided test note with marker.

steps.label: Review complete form before publish
steps.observe: All fields populated; campuses selected. You decide if values look correct.

steps.label: Click Publish Internship
steps.observe: Success toast; form closes; new row in list with your title.

steps.label: Confirm posting appears in published list
steps.observe: Table shows marker in title; status Published. Employer publish done — college must approve before students see it.

steps.label: Log in as college admin
steps.observe: College hub loads — approve the new listing for campus.

steps.label: Open college Internships list
steps.observe: New posting shows Campus = Pending review.

steps.label: Search for the guided internship by marker
steps.observe: Table filters to {{marker}} in the title column.

steps.label: Filter campus status to Pending review
steps.observe: Only listings awaiting college approval remain visible.

steps.label: Switch to list view
steps.observe: Table rows with Actions column — approve icon is easier to target in list view.

steps.label: Approve guided internship for campus
steps.observe: Row with {{marker}} — click Approve for campus (green check icon; skipped if already Approved).

steps.label: Confirm campus status is Approved
steps.observe: Filter Campus status → Approved; {{marker}} row shows Approved badge. Students can now browse it.
